PUT /bank/reconciliation/{id}/:adjustmen.summary: Add an adjustment to reconciliation by ID.

PUT /bank/reconciliation/transactions/un.summary: Get all unmatched transactions in csv format

PUT /bank/reconciliation/match/:suggest.summary: Suggest matches for a bank reconciliation by ID.

PUT /token/employee/:create.summary: Create an employee token. Only selected consumers are allowed

PUT /employee/preferences/:changeLanguag.summary: Change current employees language to the given language

PUT /employee/entitlement/:grantClientEn.summary: [BETA] Update employee entitlements in client account.

PUT /invoice/{id}/:createCreditNote.summary: Creates a new Invoice representing a credit memo that nullifies the given invoice. Updates this invoice and any pre-existing inverse invoice.

PUT /invoice/{id}/:createReminder.summary: Create invoice reminder and sends it by the given dispatch type. Supports the reminder types SOFT_REMINDER, REMINDER and NOTICE_OF_DEBT_COLLECTION. Di

PUT /invoice/{id}/:payment.summary: Update invoice. The invoice is updated with payment information. The amount is in the invoice’s currency.

PUT /invoice/{id}/:send.summary: Send invoice by ID and sendType. Optionally override email recipient.

PUT /ledger/voucher/{id}/:reverse.summary: Reverses the voucher, and returns the reversed voucher. Supports reversing most voucher types, except salary transactions.

PUT /ledger/voucher/historical/:reverseH.summary: [BETA] Deletes all historical vouchers. Requires the "All vouchers" and "Advanced Voucher" permissions.

PUT /internal/nhoAdmin/:abort.summary: Aborts all scheduled NHO membership events

PUT /order/{id}/:attach.summary: Attach document to specified order ID.

PUT /order/{id}/:invoice.summary: Create new invoice or subscription invoice from order.

PUT /order/:invoiceMultipleOrders.summary: [BETA] Charges a single customer invoice from multiple orders. The orders must be to the same customer, currency, due date, receiver email, attn. and

PUT /order/{id}/:unApproveSubscriptionIn.summary: Unapproves the order for subscription invoicing.

PUT /order/orderline/{id}/:pickLine.summary: [BETA] Pick order line. This is only available for customers who have Logistics and who activated the available inventory functionality.

PUT /order/orderline/{id}/:unpickLine.summary: [BETA] Unpick order line.This is only available for customers who have Logistics and who activated the available inventory functionality.

PUT /purchaseOrder/{id}/:send.summary: Send purchase order by ID and sendType. Only available for Logistics Basic.

PUT /purchaseOrder/{id}/:sendByEmail.summary: Send purchase order by customisable email. Only available for Logistics Basic.

PUT /purchaseOrder/deviation/{id}/:appro.summary: Approve deviations. Only available for Logistics Basic.

PUT /purchaseOrder/deviation/{id}/:deliv.summary: Send deviations to approval. Only available for Logistics Basic.

PUT /purchaseOrder/deviation/{id}/:undel.summary: Set status to Not delivered for deviations. Only available for Logistics Basic.

PUT /purchaseOrder/goodsReceipt/{id}/:co.summary: Confirm goods receipt. Only available for Logistics Basic.

PUT /purchaseOrder/goodsReceipt/{id}/:re.summary: Receive all ordered products and approve goods receipt. Only available for Logistics Basic.
Register goods receipt. Quantity received on the products is set to the same as quantity ordered. To update the quantity received, use PUT /purchaseOr

POST /supplierInvoice/{invoiceId}/:addPa.summary: Register payment, paymentType == 0 finds the last paymentType for this vendor.Use of this method requires setup done by Tripletex.

PUT /supplierInvoice/{invoiceId}/:change.summary: Change dimension on a supplier invoice.

PUT /timesheet/month/:approve.summary: approve month(s).  If id is provided the other args are ignored

PUT /timesheet/month/:complete.summary: complete month(s).  If id is provided the other args are ignored

PUT /timesheet/month/:reopen.summary: reopen month(s).  If id is provided the other args are ignored

PUT /timesheet/month/:unapprove.summary: unapprove month(s).  If id is provided the other args are ignored

PUT /timesheet/week/:approve.summary: Approve week. By ID or (ISO-8601 week and employeeId combination).

PUT /timesheet/week/:complete.summary: Complete week. By ID or (ISO-8601 week and employeeId combination).

PUT /timesheet/week/:reopen.summary: Reopen week. By ID or (ISO-8601 week and employeeId combination).

PUT /timesheet/week/:unapprove.summary: Unapprove week. By ID or (ISO-8601 week and employeeId combination).
